title: trifolium fragiferum var. durandoi
intro: Trifolium fragiferum var. durandoi, also known as the strawberry clover, is a perennial legume that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Its leaves and flowers have been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, such as arthritis and digestive disorders. The leaves and flowers of the strawberry clover can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are herbal preparations that can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
